guidelines.name: Blood Pressure Screening
guidelines.recommendation: Screen adults 18 and older. Annually for ages 40+ or those with risk factors; every 3-5 years for ages 18-39 with no risk factors.

guidelines.name: Cholesterol (Lipid Panel)
guidelines.recommendation: Adults 40-75 without known CVD should be screened; optional in younger adults with risk factors.

guidelines.name: Type 2 Diabetes / Prediabetes Screening
guidelines.recommendation: Screen adults aged 35-70 who are overweight or obese. Repeat every 3 years if normal.

guidelines.name: Colorectal Cancer Screening
guidelines.recommendation: Screen adults 45-75. Options: colonoscopy every 10 years, FIT annually, or Cologuard every 3 years.

guidelines.name: Breast Cancer Screening (Mammogram)
guidelines.recommendation: Women aged 40-74 should get a mammogram every 2 years. Earlier or more frequent if high risk.

guidelines.name: Cervical Cancer Screening (Pap/HPV)
guidelines.recommendation: Women 21-29: Pap every 3 years. Women 30-65: co-test (Pap+HPV) every 5 years or Pap alone every 3 years.

guidelines.name: Lung Cancer Screening (Low-dose CT)
guidelines.recommendation: Adults 50-80 with 20+ pack-year smoking history who currently smoke or quit within past 15 years. Annual LDCT.

guidelines.name: Prostate Cancer Screening (PSA)
guidelines.recommendation: Men 55-69: individualized decision. Discuss benefits and harms with doctor.

guidelines.name: Bone Density (DEXA) Scan
guidelines.recommendation: Women 65+ and postmenopausal women with risk factors.

guidelines.name: Abdominal Aortic Aneurysm Screening
guidelines.recommendation: One-time ultrasound for men aged 65-75 who have ever smoked.

guidelines.name: Depression Screening
guidelines.recommendation: Screen all adults - especially pregnant/postpartum women and older adults.

guidelines.name: Flu Vaccine
guidelines.recommendation: Annual flu shot for everyone 6 months and older.
